description: Deepen iter8: apply log1p to skewed area columns (land_area, built_area, house_area, apartment_area, all 10 area_apt_*_rooms / area_house_*_rooms). Single hypothesis_unit (log_skewed_numerics). Single preprocessing knob anchored on iter3. Hypothesis: tree splits on raw areas waste capacity on the long tail; log compression should make split thresholds carry more rows.
